game_info.title: Leo's Fortune - P5 Edition
game_info.concept:
**Leo's Fortune:** Players control Leo, a sentient furball, navigating 24 hand-crafted platforming levels by using a virtual joystick on the left side of the screen for horizontal movement and swiping up on the right side to inflate, allowing Leo to float or roll faster, and swiping down to deflate for precise landings. The core gameplay involves solving physics-based puzzles by manipulating environmental objects, activating switches, and timing movements to avoid various traps and hazards. The objective in each level is to collect all scattered gold coins, which act as breadcrumbs left by a thief, to progress to the next stage. Upon completing all 24 levels, a Hard-core Mode is unlocked, challenging players to finish the entire game without dying, with Game Center leaderboards tracking fastest completion times for each level.

CRITICAL FILENAME REQUIREMENTS:
- All JavaScript filenames MUST be 50 characters or less
- Use simple, descriptive names: game.js, player.js, physics.js, rendering.js, input.js, levels.js, entities.js, globals.js
- NEVER use the concept description, game title, or long text as a filename
- Filenames should only contain letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens
- Keep filenames under 50 characters total (including .js extension)
game_info.description: You are Leo, a sentient ball of fluff on a quest to recover your stolen gold. Roll, jump, and float through treacherous levels filled with traps and puzzles. Use your unique ability to inflate (float) and deflate (dive) to navigate obstacles. Collect all gold coins to unlock the portal to the next level.
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Left / Right: Roll along the ground
- Space / Arrow Up: Inflate (Jump / Float / Slow Fall)
- Arrow Down: Deflate (Dive / Fast Fall / Shrink)
- Enter: Start Game / Next Level
- R: Restart Level
- Esc: Pause Game

TEST_1.test_description: Verify player movement and coin collection mechanics.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The automated controller will hold the Right Arrow key to move the player towards the first coin in the level.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The test is successful if the score increases from 0 within the first 10 seconds of gameplay.

TEST_2.test_description: Verify level completion logic (reaching the exit).
TEST_2.strategy_description: The controller will navigate the level by moving right and jumping (inflating) over gaps to reach the portal at the end.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The test is successful if the game state changes to specific level completion state or transitions to the next level.

TEST_3.test_description: Verify hazard collision and death state.
TEST_3.strategy_description: The controller will deliberately move the player into a spike hazard.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: The test is successful if the game phase transitions to GAME_OVER_LOSE.
